titleStmt.title: SII 29.78: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 78. (A.R. No. B. 572 of 1961-62.) KURAḌI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: It records a grant of land at agrahāra Rūḍi for worship and offerings to god Niṁbaṇēśvara by daṇḍanāyaka Nimbaṇayya, after purchasing the land from Chandraśēkhara-bhaṭṭa, to whom it was originally sold by the donor.
It is dated is Chālukya Vikrama year 47, Śubhakrit, Pushya, ba. 10. Monday, uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1122 A.D., December 25, Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī maccāḷukya vikrama varṣada
47 neya śubhakṛt saṁvatsarada puṣya ba 10
sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyaṁdu niṁbaṇa
yya daṇḍanāyakar niṁbaṇēśvara dēvargge pūjegaṁ
nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegavāgi śrīmatsarvvana
maśyadagrahāraṁ rūḍiyalu tā(ṁ)vu munna caṁ
draśēkhara bhaṭṭarige krayavāgi koṭṭarddhavṛ
ttiyanu tāṁvu maguḷe krayavāgi ko
ṇḍāyarddha vrittiyaṁ baḷi sahitavāgi ma
hājanangaḷa sannidhānadalu dēvara śrī pā
dadalu dhārā pūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭar Ī dharmavaṁpraLetter lu is written below the line.
tipālisuvar mahājanangaḷu .
Digital edition of SII 29.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
